zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：高位窄幅震荡偏多
zh.content:
以太坊/美元当前处于高位窄幅震荡格局，价格1735附近整理，整体维持偏多结构，短线动能仍在但上行放缓。SMA20上移至1719提供支撑，趋势未破坏。  

MACD指标维持正值动能，DIF与信号线虽未完整给出但柱状仍偏扩张，显示多头动能占优，短线缺乏明显反转信号，趋势延续概率较高。  

上方阻力关注1736-1750区间，若放量突破则有望上探1780一线；下方关键支撑位于1719及1700整数关口，跌破将转为震荡回调结构。  

操作上建议以回踩1719附近分批低吸为主，若放量突破1736可顺势追多；严格设置1700下方止损，控制短线波动风险并等待方向确认。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum remains in a narrow consolidation phase against the US Dollar, with price action clustering around 1735 and only a marginal 24-hour gain of 0.12%. The intraday range between 1732 and 1736.47 highlights very low volatility and a market lacking strong directional conviction. Despite this compression, price continues to hold above the 20-period SMA near 1719.68, which maintains a mildly constructive short-term structure rather than signaling bearish breakdown pressure.

Momentum indicators present a cautiously constructive but incomplete picture. The MACD reading at 17.28056 remains in positive territory, suggesting that underlying bullish momentum is still present. However, without a visible signal line or clear crossover confirmation, the strength of the trend is harder to validate. In the absence of RSI data, price action and moving averages carry greater analytical weight. Trading above the SMA(20) continues to support near-term stability, though momentum expansion remains limited.

Key technical levels are well-defined within the current consolidation range. Immediate support is located at the intraday low near 1732, while stronger structural support sits at the SMA(20) around 1719.68. On the upside, resistance is firmly positioned at 1736.47, marking the recent high. A decisive break above this level could trigger a move toward the 1750 psychological zone, where prior supply may reintroduce selling pressure and slow further advances.

Trading conditions currently favor range-bound strategies until a clear breakout emerges. Traders may look to accumulate positions near support between 1719 and 1732, using protective stops below 1715 to manage downside risk. Profit-taking near 1736 to 1750 remains appropriate given the compressed volatility. Alternatively, a confirmed breakout above 1736.47 with increased momentum could justify trend-following long positions targeting higher resistance levels beyond 1750.
